out_of_scope_examples: Trip blocks, flight bookings, hotel itineraries (travel lane)
Reply-to-this-email nudges or social-coordination plans (email_triage lane)
Existing concert events on the calendar — leave-now / prep / post-event are calendar's lane
Speculative 'might like' suggestions for artists not named in the profile
Generic ticket-platform digests with no profile-named artist hit

surface_time_rules.sale_window_nudge: as soon as the sale-open is verified
surface_time_rules.tickets_open_countdown: 2–6 hours before the announced sale-open time
surface_time_rules.festival_lineup_update: the day the lineup change is announced

trigger_requirements.must_combine: profile-named artist/festival/circuit + a real signal (live ticket-platform email, web_search-verified sale-open, or profile-listed festival inside its 7–14-day prep window)
trigger_requirements.profile_alone_insufficient: Naming an artist in the profile is necessary but NOT sufficient — there must be a verifiable announced show or sale window.

scope.data_source: All web-grounded expected_tasks were sourced from Gemini Deep Research runs on 2026-05-02. See backend/eval/deep_research_prompts.md.

personas.fixture_summary: Today = Sat 2026-05-02. Mailbox: mom check-in (msg_mom_1), HR holiday FYI (msg_hr_1), Dad insurance forward (msg_dad_1). Calendar: Date Night Toit + Indiranagar routines. Profile top-artists: Kendrick Lamar, Frank Ocean, Prateek Kuhad, Anuv Jain, AP Dhillon, FKJ, SZA, Diljit Dosanjh. Travel anchors in window: Bali Jul 2026, Japan Oct 2026.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy tickets for Anuv Jain at Capitol Theatre Singapore on 2026-07-28 — sale open since Feb 2026, ₹15,000–16,000 ($183 SGD). Profile top-artist + 2.5h regional hop from her booked Bali Jul 2026 trip.
expected_tasks.notes: Sourced from Gemini Deep Research (Events Prompt 1). City anchor: Bali-Jul (regional hop from Denpasar).

expected_tasks.summary: Buy tickets for Anuv Jain at Zepp Kuala Lumpur on 2026-07-29 — sale open since Feb 2026, ₹4,500–5,000 (RM 247). Profile top-artist + KL is a regional hop from her Bali Jul 2026 trip; cheaper alternative to the Singapore date.

personas.expected_tasks_note: Two strong expected_tasks rooted in announced shows by profile top-artist Anuv Jain in Asian cities reachable from her Bali Jul anchor. Kendrick KL (Oct 25) is intentionally an expected_skip today — sale not yet open, only 'announced — dates pending'.
